name: select-demo
visual_summary: The Select Demo component is a reusable UI element that renders a dropdown list of options, allowing users to select one or multiple values. It is suitable for scenarios where a user needs to choose from a list of predefined options. This component is ideal for applications that require a high degree of customization and flexibility.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready select component with the following characteristics:

Name: select-demo
Description: The Select Demo component is a reusable UI element that renders a dropdown list of options, allowing users to select one or multiple values. It is suitable for scenarios where a user needs to choose from a list of predefined options. This component is ideal for applications that require a high degree of customization and flexibility.
Style: e.g. dark, default
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: select, dropdown, options, reusable, customizable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
